StepAction: Idle — await a cache-aware / legacy-large-policy compaction trigger
Provider gate: ask the strategy whether this provider needs the compaction now
Condition: needed (codex/general, or claude under real pressure)

StepAction: Run compaction (CompactionManager, unchanged) and write the anchor
Push compaction event kind='compaction' to recentEvents
On enrichment lifecycle, push event kind='enrichment' (NOT 'compaction')
Condition: enrichment entry appended under its own kind

StepAction: decideAmnesiaInjection: reverse-scan, skip kind!='compaction', reach the real compaction
Condition: amnesia decision resolved against the real anchor

StepAction: Inject amnesia notice fragment (recall affordance) for the real compaction
Resume: replay the unanswered user request post-anchor (or minimal Continue) — task continues, no manual go-on
No-op / clean exit (declined compaction, or finished turn) — wait for next user input
